title: The Stages of Reclaiming Your Body
caption: Are you ready to embrace your body's journey?
layout: 4-stage progression: Start with 'Awareness', then move to 'Acceptance', followed by 'Exploration', and end with 'Embodiment'. Each stage includes a brief description and a key action step.

title: Passion vs. Routine in Relationships
caption: Is your relationship in a passionate phase or a predictable routine?
layout: 2-column compare: One side for 'Passion' with traits like excitement and spontaneity, and the other for 'Routine' highlighting stability and predictability, along with tips for revitalising passion.

title: Emotional Intimacy Check-In
caption: How connected do you truly feel in your relationship?
layout: 2x2 grid: One axis for 'High/Low Emotional Intimacy' and the other for 'Open/Closed Communication'. Each section contains scenarios to recognise your relationship's state.

title: The Wheel of Desire
caption: Have you unlocked your full potential for pleasure?
layout: Cycle diagram: Inner circle for 'Core Desires' and outer rings for 'Barriers', 'Exploration', and 'Expression', each filled with actionable insights and prompts.

title: Communication Styles in Midlife
caption: Are you speaking the same language as your partner?
layout: 2-column compare: One side lists 'Assertive Communication' with benefits, and the other 'Passive Communication' detailing pitfalls, ending with strategies for improvement.

title: Rediscovering Self-Love
caption: How often do you put yourself first?
layout: 4-stage progression: Stages include 'Self-Recognition', 'Self-Care', 'Self-Expression', and 'Self-Connection', with activities for each stage to enhance love for self.

title: Sensual vs. Sexual Touch
caption: Do you know the difference between these types of intimacy?
layout: 2-column compare: 'Sensual Touch' lists benefits like relaxation and connection, while 'Sexual Touch' focuses on arousal and intimacy, accompanied by practical advice.

title: The Cycle of Attraction
caption: Do you feel the spark in your relationship?
layout: Cycle diagram: Stages include 'Initial Attraction', 'Emotional Connection', 'Intimacy Growth', and 'Maintenance', with tips for nurturing attraction at each phase.

title: Sustaining Connection Through Conflict
caption: Can conflict strengthen your relationship?
layout: 2x2 grid: One axis for 'Constructive/Destructive Conflict' and the other for 'Resolved/Unresolved', illustrating positive versus negative outcomes and solutions.

title: The Art of Asking
caption: Are you clear about what you need?
layout: 4-stage progression: Stages include 'Identify Needs', 'Communicate Effectively', 'Set Boundaries', and 'Embrace Vulnerability', with practical exercises for each.

title: Awakening Your Feminine Energy
caption: Are you tapping into your inner goddess?
layout: Cycle diagram: Steps include 'Self-Reflection', 'Nurturing', 'Creativity', and 'Empowerment', with insights on fostering each energy aspect.

title: Healthy Boundaries 101
caption: Do you struggle with saying 'no'?
layout: 2-column compare: 'Strong Boundaries' with benefits like respect and clarity, and 'Weak Boundaries' highlighting confusion and resentment, with strategies for improvement.

title: The Mind-Body Connection
caption: Do you listen to what your body’s telling you?
layout: 4-stage progression: Stages include 'Awareness', 'Listening', 'Integration', and 'Embodiment', with reflective prompts for each stage.

title: Revitalising Romance
caption: When was the last time you felt butterflies?
layout: Cycle diagram: Stages include 'Spontaneous Acts', 'Thoughtful Surprises', 'Quality Time', and 'Physical Affection', with creative suggestions for sparking romance.

title: The Energetic Shift in Midlife
caption: Are you tuned into your energy shifts?
layout: 2x2 grid: 'Low Energy/High Energy' and 'Positive/Negative Outlook', showing how to navigate energy states and fostering positivity.

title: The Cycle of Self-Discovery
caption: Are you re-discovering yourself after 40?
layout: Cycle diagram: Stages include 'Questioning', 'Exploring', 'Defining', and 'Embracing', with tips and questions to guide your journey.

title: The Impact of Life Transitions
caption: How do life's changes shape your intimacy?
layout: 2-column compare: 'Positive Transitions' driving growth and connection versus 'Challenging Transitions' causing distance and stress, with ways to navigate these changes.

title: Secrets of Lasting Love
caption: What keeps your love alive?
layout: 2-column compare: 'Healthy Practices' that nourish relationships alongside 'Destructive Patterns' that drain connections, ending with revitalisation tips.

title: The Emotional Checklist
caption: Are your emotions in check?
layout: 4-stage progression: Stages include 'Awareness', 'Validation', 'Expression', and 'Integration', filled with actionable steps for emotional health.

title: Navigating New Relationships
caption: Are you ready to date again?
layout: 2x2 grid: 'Ready/Not Ready' by 'Open/Closed', exploring feelings around dating and tips for being open to new experiences.

title: Intimacy Red Flags
caption: Are there warning signs in your relationship?
layout: 2-column compare: 'Healthy Intimacy' showcasing connection and trust versus 'Unhealthy Intimacy' showing distance and dysfunction, accompanied by supportive insights.

title: Balancing Independence and Togetherness
caption: Do you know how to strike the right balance?
layout: Cycle diagram: Elements include 'Personal Space', 'Shared Experiences', 'Communication', and 'Support', with thoughtful prompts for relationship harmony.
